Introduction Frank Kilcommins & Erik Wilde: Agent Skills, MCP, and Workflows: Tools for Enabling Agents

(3) Frank Kilcommins

  • Head of Enterprise Architecture at Jentic [https://jentic.com/]
  • Governance Board Member at the OpenAPI Initiative [https://www.openapis.org/]
  • Co-Maintainer of the Arazzo Specification [https://spec.openapis.org/arazzo/latest.html]
  • linkedin.com/in/frank-kilcommins [https://www.linkedin.com/in/frank-kilcommins]
  • @fkilcommins.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/fkilcommins.bsky.social]
